---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think it should work. Include mockups or sketches if you have them.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Stellar / Blockchain Relevance

Does this feature touch the Stellar integration? If so, describe how.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references.
